# TEMPORARY vendored zeropod

Snapshot of blueshift-gg/zeropod branch chore/solana-address-2-6
(solana-address <3, wincode 0.5 — both wire-identical widenings).
Exists only so the workspace [patch.crates-io] resolves in fresh
git checkouts. Publish zeropod >=0.3.4, then delete this directory
and every patch that points at it.
